TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: ita_Tayal_musa_qmalup_squ_Skahmayun_泰雅族征伐史卡瑪溫人
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 西元: == 約1700 ki'an rhzyal 'ringan zyaw事件起因: mhuw sraral lga mqyanux Sbayan Pinsbkan qu Tayal. llingay b'nux ga cyux ki'an Skahmayun kwara. sblaq ta lhga ru pbbiq pngsa ta qoyat qsinuw uzi. ana ga maki' qutux ryax. mrkyas ta mh_yapas squ krakis Skahmayun ru wal pqilun qsuyan na krakis qu mrkyas tayal. pongan krahu kinButa ru syukaw ta muci. yasa musa qmalup ki'an rhzyal nqu Skahmayun. kahul Pinsbkan musa qmalup rrgyax Hagay ru llyung ka ki'an Skahmayun. qinlupan tayal qani krayas sa Slamaw, Qoyaw, Sqabu, Pyanan, Tunan, Gogan si tta ngungu kli ru Sliban. ktan kinButa rhzyal qani ghzi ru blaq baqun maki' ngasal. yasa bzinah mwah Pinsbkan lga, kyalun nya ggluw ru llaqi. usa gmluw sinlayan maku lawi pinshzyan ru bhoyaw mqyanux kya. .Buta討伐時, . zyaw pcingan事件後影響 ita Tayal kahul Pinsbkan musa pinshzyal sa rrgyax te rhzyaq ru llyu qara llyung. mbhoyaw thluyan mqyanux ghzi rhzyal sa hhlahuy te rhzyaq Taywan. Tayal Mknazi泰雅族馬卡納奇族群 Tayal Mlipa 泰雅族馬力巴族群 Skahmayun 史卡馬溫人 mrhuw tgleng領導者 Tayal- Buta krahu 泰雅族-大長老Buta Tayal Mknazi- Ayan, Yabo 泰雅族馬卡納奇- Ayan和Yabo Tayal Mlipa- Bangay, Qbul 泰雅族馬力巴-Bangay和Qbul Skahmayun-Blaq squliq / Yaqih squliq 史卡瑪溫-Blaq和Yaqih
S.PHON: == **: == ***** kiʔan rħzjal ʔriŋan zjaw****: mħuw s~ɕraral lɣa mqjanux s~ɕβajan pins~ɕβkan qu tajal. lliŋaj βʔnux ɣa ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan s~ɕkaħmajun kwara. s~ɕβlaq ta lħɣa ru pββiq pŋs~ɕa ta qojat qs~ɕinuw uzi. ana ɣa makiʔ qutux rjax. mrkjas~ɕ ta mħəjapas~ɕ s~ɕqu krakis~ɕ s~ɕkaħmajun ru wal pqilun qs~ɕujan na krakis~ɕ qu mrkjas~ɕ tajal. poŋan kraħu kinβuta ru s~ɕjukaw ta muʦ~ʨi. jas~ɕa mus~ɕa qmalup kiʔan rħzjal nqu s~ɕkaħmajun. kaħul pins~ɕβkan mus~ɕa qmalup rrɣjax ħaɣaj ru lljuŋ ka kiʔan s~ɕkaħmajun. qinlupan tajal qani krajas~ɕ s~ɕa s~ɕlamaw, qojaw, s~ɕqaβu, pjanan, tunan, ɣoɣan s~ɕi tta ŋuŋu kli ru s~ɕliβan. ktan kinβuta rħzjal qani ɣħzi ru βlaq βaqun makiʔ ŋas~ɕal. jas~ɕa βzinaħ mwaħ pins~ɕβkan lɣa, kjalun nja ɣɣluw ru llaqi. us~ɕa ɣmluw s~ɕinlajan maku lawi pins~ɕħzjan ru βħojaw mqjanux kja. .βuta***, . zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan***** ita tajal kaħul pins~ɕβkan mus~ɕa pins~ɕħzjal s~ɕa rrɣjax te rħzjaq ru llju qara lljuŋ. mβħojaw tħlujan mqjanux ɣħzi rħzjal s~ɕa ħħlaħuj te rħzjaq tajwan. tajal mknazi********* tajal mlipa ******** s~ɕkaħmajun ***** mrħuw tɣleŋ*** tajal- βuta kraħu ***-***βuta tajal mknazi- ajan, jaβo *******- ajan*jaβo tajal mlipa- βaŋaj, qβul ******-βaŋaj*qβul s~ɕkaħmajun-βlaq s~ɕquliq / jaqiħ s~ɕquliq ****-βlaq*jaqiħ
S.FORM: == 西元: == 約1700 ki'an rhzyal 'ringan zyaw事件起因: mhuw sraral lga mqyanux Sbayan Pinsbkan qu Tayal. llingay b'nux ga cyux ki'an Skahmayun kwara. sblaq ta lhga ru pbbiq pngsa ta qoyat qsinuw uzi. ana ga maki' qutux ryax. mrkyas ta mh_yapas squ krakis Skahmayun ru wal pqilun qsuyan na krakis qu mrkyas tayal. pongan krahu kinButa ru syukaw ta muci. yasa musa qmalup ki'an rhzyal nqu Skahmayun. kahul Pinsbkan musa qmalup rrgyax Hagay ru llyung ka ki'an Skahmayun. qinlupan tayal qani krayas sa Slamaw, Qoyaw, Sqabu, Pyanan, Tunan, Gogan si tta ngungu kli ru Sliban. ktan kinButa rhzyal qani ghzi ru blaq baqun maki' ngasal. yasa bzinah mwah Pinsbkan lga, kyalun nya ggluw ru llaqi. usa gmluw sinlayan maku lawi pinshzyan ru bhoyaw mqyanux kya. .Buta討伐時, . zyaw pcingan事件後影響 ita Tayal kahul Pinsbkan musa pinshzyal sa rrgyax te rhzyaq ru llyu qara llyung. mbhoyaw thluyan mqyanux ghzi rhzyal sa hhlahuy te rhzyaq Taywan. Tayal Mknazi泰雅族馬卡納奇族群 Tayal Mlipa 泰雅族馬力巴族群 Skahmayun 史卡馬溫人 mrhuw tgleng領導者 Tayal- Buta krahu 泰雅族-大長老Buta Tayal Mknazi- Ayan, Yabo 泰雅族馬卡納奇- Ayan和Yabo Tayal Mlipa- Bangay, Qbul 泰雅族馬力巴-Bangay和Qbul Skahmayun-Blaq squliq / Yaqih squliq 史卡瑪溫-Blaq和Yaqih
S.PHON: == **: == ***** kiʔan rħzjal ʔriŋan zjaw****: mħuw s~ɕraral lɣa mqjanux s~ɕβajan pins~ɕβkan qu tajal. lliŋaj βʔnux ɣa ʦ~ʨjux kiʔan s~ɕkaħmajun kwara. s~ɕβlaq ta lħɣa ru pββiq pŋs~ɕa ta qojat qs~ɕinuw uzi. ana ɣa makiʔ qutux rjax. mrkjas~ɕ ta mħəjapas~ɕ s~ɕqu krakis~ɕ s~ɕkaħmajun ru wal pqilun qs~ɕujan na krakis~ɕ qu mrkjas~ɕ tajal. poŋan kraħu kinβuta ru s~ɕjukaw ta muʦ~ʨi. jas~ɕa mus~ɕa qmalup kiʔan rħzjal nqu s~ɕkaħmajun. kaħul pins~ɕβkan mus~ɕa qmalup rrɣjax ħaɣaj ru lljuŋ ka kiʔan s~ɕkaħmajun. qinlupan tajal qani krajas~ɕ s~ɕa s~ɕlamaw, qojaw, s~ɕqaβu, pjanan, tunan, ɣoɣan s~ɕi tta ŋuŋu kli ru s~ɕliβan. ktan kinβuta rħzjal qani ɣħzi ru βlaq βaqun makiʔ ŋas~ɕal. jas~ɕa βzinaħ mwaħ pins~ɕβkan lɣa, kjalun nja ɣɣluw ru llaqi. us~ɕa ɣmluw s~ɕinlajan maku lawi pins~ɕħzjan ru βħojaw mqjanux kja. .βuta***, . zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan***** ita tajal kaħul pins~ɕβkan mus~ɕa pins~ɕħzjal s~ɕa rrɣjax te rħzjaq ru llju qara lljuŋ. mβħojaw tħlujan mqjanux ɣħzi rħzjal s~ɕa ħħlaħuj te rħzjaq tajwan. tajal mknazi********* tajal mlipa ******** s~ɕkaħmajun ***** mrħuw tɣleŋ*** tajal- βuta kraħu ***-***βuta tajal mknazi- ajan, jaβo *******- ajan*jaβo tajal mlipa- βaŋaj, qβul ******-βaŋaj*qβul s~ɕkaħmajun-βlaq s~ɕquliq / jaqiħ s~ɕquliq ****-βlaq*jaqiħ
